outlook.volatilityExpectation: Moderate volatility expected. Negative GEX in 0DTE/Weekly may amplify downside moves. Spot trading above all visible strikes creates asymmetric risk.
outlook.summary: Spot at 6374.25 trades above all visible option strikes in datasets. High call concentration at 6350 (Weekly 215 OI) and 6250 (0DTE 109 + Weekly 58) creates magnetic support zones. Monthly reverse smirk skew indicates bullish bias but volume PCR at 1.65 shows hedging activity. No visible overhead resistance - upside path clear. Dealers short ITM calls provide underlying support.

levels.motivazione: Highest Weekly OI concentration (215) closest to spot. Primary magnetic support zone with dealer short gamma hedging creating underlying bid.
Multi-expiry confluence: 0DTE dominant OI (109) + Weekly significant OI (58). Strong structural support with combined gamma exposure.
Secondary Weekly OI cluster (42). Friction zone between primary magnetic levels. Dealer delta hedging creates minor support.
Highest 0DTE OI near spot (56). Intraday magnetic attraction with dealer short call hedging providing underlying bid support.
Dominant Monthly OI concentration (67). Structural support with positive GEX (0.02B) providing stability at this level.
